assertions.title: Full audit flow end-to-end

steps.observed: Submit form displayed with URL input, scenario cards, persona cards
URL field populated

steps.action: Select only Cookie Consent scenario and Privacy Sensitive persona
steps.observed: Deselected other scenarios and personas by clicking cards
Navigated to /audits/f01dcf44-e201-4073-a526-7f67916a8ec7/run

steps.expected: Progress reaches 100%, Open report button appears
steps.observed: Audit completed with 100% progress, all timeline events shown (QUEUE, START, BROWSER, DETECTORS, REPORT)
Navigated to /audits/f01dcf44-e201-4073-a526-7f67916a8ec7/report with Trust Score 100/100

steps.action: Verify findings with regulatory/confidence on booking.com audit
steps.expected: Findings show confidence scores and regulatory badges
steps.observed: Confidence scores (97%) displayed as pills on FindingCards. Regulatory categories empty for pre-seeded data (expected per AGENTS.md).
GET /api/audits/{id}/report/pdf returned HTTP 200

assertions.issues: Regulatory categories are empty arrays on pre-seeded findings (expected per AGENTS.md guidance - data seeded before regulatory mapping was wired in orchestrator). Confidence scores display correctly.

assertions.title: History to report to diff navigation

steps.observed: History page loaded with 27 total audits, filter tabs, and search box
List filtered to show only booking.com audits
Report page displayed with Trust Score 12/100, 28 findings, 3 scenarios, 3 personas
Navigated to /audits/6af01314.../diff with 3 personas compared, 5 differences found
Returned to /history page

steps.action: Navigate to history, find test-cross-001 audit
steps.expected: Audit entry with Rerun button visible
steps.observed: Audit f01dcf44 visible with Rerun button

steps.expected: New audit created, navigate to run page
steps.observed: New audit 21b18475 created, navigated to /audits/21b18475.../run

steps.action: Wait for new audit to complete
steps.observed: Audit completed with 100% progress, Trust Score 100

steps.expected: Both old and new audits visible
steps.observed: Both audits visible in history list

steps.action: Select both old (f01dcf44) and new (21b18475) audits via checkboxes
steps.observed: Compare (2/2) button enabled after checking both checkboxes
Navigated to /compare?a=21b18475...&b=f01dcf44... showing side-by-side comparison

steps.expected: Trust score delta, finding counts shown
steps.observed: Trust Score Delta: 0, Audit A (100) vs Audit B (100), Risk Level LOW/LOW, Findings 0/0, Scenarios 1/1
6 categories: manipulative_design, deceptive_content, coercive_flow, obstruction, sneaking, social_proof_manipulation
Identical 6 categories in same order

Backend and frontend regulatory mappings are identical (manipulative_design->[FTC,DSA], deceptive_content->[FTC,GDPR,DSA], coercive_flow->[FTC,DSA], obstruction->[GDPR,DSA,CPRA], sneaking->[FTC,GDPR,DSA,CPRA], social_proof_manipulation->[FTC,DSA])
Both have: asymmetric_choice, hidden_costs, confirmshaming, obstruction, sneaking, urgency
Both have: cookie_consent, subscription_cancellation, checkout_flow, account_deletion, newsletter_signup, pricing_comparison
Both have: privacy_sensitive, cost_sensitive, exit_intent
Both have: low, medium, high, critical
Both have: nova_ai, heuristic, mock, rule_based with matching labels
Imports REGULATION_INFO, getEvidenceTypeLabel, formatConfidenceAsPercentage from taxonomy constants. No hardcoded category strings.

steps.action: Grep all .tsx files for hardcoded pattern names
steps.expected: Only in taxonomy.ts and test files
steps.observed: Category strings only in taxonomy.ts, taxonomy.test.ts, and test fixture files (ReportPage.test.tsx, PersonaDiffPage.test.tsx, ComparePage.test.tsx, FindingCard.test.tsx). No hardcoded categories in production components.

steps.action: Verify rendered FindingCard badges match taxonomy
steps.observed: FindingCards on booking.com report show 'Asymmetric Choice', 'Sneaking' (titleized from taxonomy pattern_family values). Confidence shown as '97% confidence'. Source labels from EVIDENCE_TYPE_LABELS.

evidence.network: N/A - code comparison via Read and Grep tools

assertions.title: Error recovery flow

steps.action: Check for failed audits via API
steps.observed: No audits have 'failed' status. 2 audits stuck in 'running' state.

steps.action: Check Failed filter on history page
steps.observed: 0 audits shown when Failed filter selected

steps.action: Check Running filter on history page
steps.observed: 2 running audits shown with 'RUNNING' badge and 'Rerun' buttons

steps.action: Verify frontend code handles failed state
steps.observed: RunPage.tsx lines 126-150: displays error-state div with '❌ Audit Failed' heading, error details, and links to error report and back to history. HistoryPage.tsx uses 'status-badge status-failed' CSS class for failed status badge.

steps.action: Verify stuck running audit (04ff21a2) shows run page
steps.observed: RunPage displays 41% progress, current focus 'Checkout Flow', evidence captured: 4. Audit has been stuck since Mar 12, 5:27 AM.

assertions.issues: Cannot test full error recovery flow end-to-end because no audits have 'failed' status in the database. The frontend code IS properly implemented to handle failed audits (RunPage shows error state, HistoryPage shows failed badge, rerun button available). However, since no failure can be triggered without modifying backend/infrastructure (which is outside this validator's scope), the assertion is blocked.

frictions.description: agent-browser 'click @ref' did not work for cursor-interactive elements (returned 'Missing arguments for: click'). Had to use 'find text' or 'find role button --name' alternatives.
frictions.resolution: Used 'find text' and 'find role button click --name' commands instead of @ref-based clicks for scenario/persona card toggles and action buttons

frictions.description: agent-browser 'fill @ref' did not work for URL input (interpreted URL as CSS selector). Had to use 'find placeholder' approach.
frictions.resolution: Used 'agent-browser find placeholder "https://www.example.com" fill "https://www.test-cross-001.example.com"' to fill the URL field

frictions.description: Regulatory categories are empty arrays on all pre-seeded findings because data was seeded before the orchestrator wired in get_regulations_for_pattern_family().
frictions.resolution: Expected behavior per AGENTS.md Advanced Intelligence Data Context. New findings created via the orchestrator would have regulatory categories populated.

blockers.description: No audits with 'failed' status exist in the database. Cannot trigger an audit failure without modifying backend code or infrastructure, which is outside the scope of a flow validator.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked all audits via API (none failed), checked history page 'Failed' filter (0 results), verified frontend code handles error state correctly via code review

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-CROSS-001, VAL-CROSS-002, VAL-CROSS-003), 1 passed via code comparison (VAL-CROSS-004), 1 blocked (VAL-CROSS-005: no failed audits in database to test error recovery flow). Full audit flow, navigation chain, rerun/compare, and taxonomy consistency all work correctly.
